data.title: Mantle H1 2026: Building the Financial System in Full Force for Real-World Assets
data.description: Mantle has achieved over $1 billion in total value locked (TVL) on its blockchain network. The company is focusing on enhancing tokenized equities, institutional liquidity, and establishing the fundamentals of agentic finance. This news was disclosed by Mantle in Dubai, UAE, on July 2, 2026. Mantle serves as the key link between conventional financial systems and blockchain-based liquidity solutions.

data.title: MicroTech Awarded All Three Categories on a $60 Billion Next Generation Awarded NASA SEWP VI Governmentwide Acquisition Contract (GWAC)
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Delray Beach, Virginia, MicroTech, a prominent Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) specializing in cutting-edge technology solutions for the Federal Government, revealed it secured three distinct contracts through the NASA Solutions for Enterprise.

data.title: Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute Celebrates Ribbon Cutting of New Downtown Sarasota Location
data.description: A new advanced facility has increased access to full cancer care in Fort Myers, Florida. Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC (FCS) marked the launch of its latest Sarasota Downtown center on July 2, 2026. The grand opening included a ribbon-cutting ceremony and the facility is currently open to serve the community.

data.title: As Airport Operators Across the Country Pursue PFAS Claims, Milberg Calls on Those Still on the Sidelines to Take Action
data.description: Milberg PLLC advises operators to hold manufacturers accountable for the actual costs incurred. The law firm, known for representing various U.S. airports in lawsuits related to PFAS, has noticed a rise in requests for information. They are actively pursuing claims against manufacturers to recover expenses.

data.title: Frontline Justice Begins Nationwide Rollout of 'Frontline Q' with Josef
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Frontline Justice revealed a significant development in its mission to address the access-to-justice disparity. The national nonprofit disclosed the expansion of its partnership with legal automation firm Josef across multiple states. This expansion comes after a prosperous trial run in Alaska.

data.title: Danone USA's Economic Impact: Putting Health Through Food in Action for America
data.description: A recent study revealed that Danone's operations contributed significantly to the U.S. economy in 2025, with a reported impact of $9.6 billion. The study highlighted that Danone procures around 90% of its ingredients locally, showcasing a commitment to domestic sourcing. In the same year, the company acquired an estimated 200 million gallons of milk from American farms spanning various states. This substantial investment in U.S. farms not only underscores Danone's reliance on local resources but also demonstrates its significant footprint in the country.

data.title: Moomoo Launches "Moomoo Engine" — Unifying the Platform's Full Trading Toolkit Into One Connected System
data.description: Moomoo's integrated trading platform offers three key features - Fundamental Engine, Options Engine, and Technical Engine - providing users with a seamless path from initial research to final execution. This all-in-one platform streamlines the trading process by incorporating three crucial engines, which enable users to make informed decisions and execute trades efficiently. The platform's comprehensive approach aims to enhance the overall trading experience by offering users a variety of tools and resources within a single interface.

data.title: Major blockchain upgrades in 2026: Ethereum's Glamsterdam & Solana's Alpenglow. Focus on protocol advancements, not prices.
data.description: In the year 2026, significant advancements in the cryptocurrency realm were seen with Ethereum's Glamsterdam and Solana's Alpenglow. These developments primarily focused on protocol upgrades rather than fluctuations in prices. These upgrades marked a pivotal moment for the industry as Ethereum and Solana made strides towards improving their technology and capabilities. The year 2026 witnessed a key shift towards enhancing the infrastructure and underlying protocols of these cryptocurrencies, indicating a strong focus on innovation and development within the sector.
